settings.text: Let's see if this is a fit.

The first call is thirty minutes, video or phone. I'll ask what you're trying to decide and why it's proving hard. If the fit is wrong I'll say so — and often suggest someone better suited. If it's right, we'll sketch what a scoped engagement would look like. No pitch, either way.

settings.title: Clearpath
settings.text: Independent strategy and operations advisory. One engagement at a time, by design.

settings.title: Availability
settings.text:
Booking engagements starting in late spring

One new engagement a month, maximum

settings.title: Based
settings.text:
New York

On-site in the tri-state area, remote elsewhere

settings.question: What should I send before the call?
settings.answer: Ideally: a few sentences on what you're trying to decide, rough numbers on company stage, and whether there's a deadline. That's enough for the first conversation to be useful.

settings.question: Is there a fee for the first conversation?
settings.answer: No. The first call is thirty minutes and free. It's a fit call, not billable advisory work.

settings.question: How quickly can we start?
settings.answer: Usually four to six weeks from fit call to engagement kickoff. I only run one new engagement a month, so scheduling is the longest variable.

settings.question: What if we're not the right fit?
settings.answer: I'll tell you, on the call. In most of those cases I can point you to someone who is. Referring well is part of the work.
